creator: treif@mayn.de
text:
New port of gkrellm-mailwatch. A plugin for gkrellm which watches
multiple mailboxes.

Fix: --------------F0A120031520790EA6ED69F1
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii;
 name="gkrellm-mailwatch-port"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: inline;
 filename="gkrellm-mailwatch-port"



--------------F0A120031520790EA6ED69F1----bya0Dh0wE3ppzs5fAp7zbByPVw0jBDAeI3XNvivMWcFjaFTe
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.shar"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.shar"

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	gkrellm-mailwatch
#	gkrellm-mailwatch/files
#	gkrellm-mailwatch/files/md5
#	gkrellm-mailwatch/patches
#	gkrellm-mailwatch/patches/patch-aa
#	gkrellm-mailwatch/patches/patch-ab
#	gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg
#	gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/COMMENT
#	gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/DESCR
#	gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/PLIST
#	gkrellm-mailwatch/Makefile
#
echo c - gkrellm-mailwatch
mkdir -p gkrellm-mailwatch > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - gkrellm-mailwatch/files
mkdir -p gkrellm-mailwatch/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - gkrellm-mailwatch/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >gkrellm-mailwatch/files/md5 << 'END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/files/md5'
XMD5 (mailwatch-0.2.tar.gz) = bec6b0b305c27e7ee10e6f9bda416c59
END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/files/md5
echo c - gkrellm-mailwatch/patches
mkdir -p gkrellm-mailwatch/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - gkrellm-mailwatch/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >gkrellm-mailwatch/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/patches/patch-aa'
X--- Makefile.orig	Wed Aug 23 01:49:11 2000
X+++ Makefile	Wed Aug 23 01:52:16 2000
X@@ -1,32 +1,30 @@
X # Makefile for the GKrellM mailwatch plugin
X 
X-GTK_INCLUDE = `gtk-config --cflags`
X-GTK_LIB = `gtk-config --libs`
X+GTK_INCLUDE = `$(GTK_CONFIG) --cflags`
X+GTK_LIB = `$(GTK_CONFIG) --libs`
X 
X-GKRELLM_INCLUDE= -I/usr/local/include
X+GKRELLM_INCLUDE= -I$(PREFIX)/include
X 
X IMLIB_INCLUDE = `imlib-config --cflags-gdk`
X IMLIB_LIB = `imlib-config --libs-gdk`
X 
X INSTALL=install -c -s -m 755
X 
X-FLAGS = -O2 -Wall -fPIC $(GTK_INCLUDE) $(IMLIB_INCLUDE) $(GKRELLM_INCLUDE)
X+CFLAGS+= -Wall -fPIC $(GTK_INCLUDE) $(IMLIB_INCLUDE) $(GKRELLM_INCLUDE)
X LIBS = $(GTK_LIB) $(IMLIB_LIB)
X-LFLAGS = -shared -lpthread
X-
X-CC = gcc -g $(CFLAGS) $(FLAGS)
X+LFLAGS = -shared -pthread
X 
X OBJS = mailwatch.o
X 
X all: mailwatch.so
X 
X mailwatch.so: $(OBJS)
X-	$(CC) $(OBJS) -o mailwatch.so $(LFLAGS) $(LIBS)
X+	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) $(OBJS) -o mailwatch.so $(LFLAGS) $(LIBS)
X 
X clean:
X 	rm -f *.o core *.so* *.bak *~
X+
X install: 
X-	$(INSTALL) -c -s -m 755  mailwatch.so /usr/share/gkrellm/plugins
X+	$(INSTALL) mailwatch.so $(PREFIX)/libexec/gkrellm/plugins
X 
X mailwatch.c.o: mailwatch.c
X-
END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/patches/patch-aa
echo x - gkrellm-mailwatch/patches/patch-ab
sed 's/^X//' >gkrellm-mailwatch/patches/patch-ab << 'END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/patches/patch-ab'
X--- mailwatch.c.orig	Wed Aug 23 02:09:36 2000
X+++ mailwatch.c	Wed Aug 23 02:12:48 2000
X@@ -403,13 +403,14 @@
X     }
X   else {
X     for (i=ctabs; i ; i = i->next) 
X-      if (i->is_modified != DELETED)
X+      if (i->is_modified != DELETED) {
X         if (!strcmp(i->name,buf[0]) && i->is_modified != DELETED) {
X            gkrellm_message_window("Gkrellm mailwatch Error",
X                "a mailpanel with that name already exits",NULL);
X            return;
X            }
X         else pos++;
X+      }
X         
X     new = create_configtab(ctabs->tabs,buf[0],256,pos);
X     new->is_modified = NEW;
END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/patches/patch-ab
echo c - gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg
mkdir -p gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/COMMENT'
XGKrellM mailwatch plugin
END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/DESCR'
XGKrellM mailwatch plugin
X
XA plugin for gkrellm, that watches in multiple mailboxes for new mail.
X
XAuthor:	Sjoerd Simons <Sjoerd@donald-duck.ele.tue.nl>
XWWW:	http://gkrellm.luon.net/mailwatch.phtml
END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/DESCR
echo x - gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/PLIST'
Xlibexec/gkrellm/plugins/mailwatch.so
END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/pkg/PLIST
echo x - gkrellm-mailwatch/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >gkrellm-mailwatch/Makefile << 'END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	gkrellm-mailwatch
X# Date Created:		22.08.2000
X# Whom:			Tobias Reifenberger <treif@mayn.de>
X#
X# $FreeBSD:$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	gkrellm-mailwatch
XPORTVERSION= 	0.2
XCATEGORIES=	mail
XMASTER_SITES=	http://gkrellm.luon.net/files/
XDISTNAME=	mailwatch-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=	treif@mayn.de
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	gtk12.2:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk12 \
X		gdk_imlib.5:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/imlib
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	${X11BASE}/include/gkrellm/gkrellm.h:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/gkrellm
XRUN_DEPENDS=	gkrellm:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/gkrellm
X
XGTK_CONFIG?=	${X11BASE}/bin/gtk12-config
XUSE_X_PREFIX=	yes
XMAKE_ENV=	GTK_CONFIG="${GTK_CONFIG}"
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/mailwatch
X
Xdo-install:
X		${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/libexec/gkrellm/plugins
X		${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/mailwatch.so ${PREFIX}/libexec/gkrellm/plugins
X		
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-gkrellm-mailwatch/Makefile
exit
